name: Sakura Matou

She is outwardly shy and timid, but possesses great inner strength. Sakura has a long standing and obvious crush on Shirou Emiya.

name: Megumin
description: Megumin is an archmage and the self-proclaimed top genius of the Crimson Demons, an order of magicians who are born with high intelligence and magical powers. Despite being an archwizard, she can only use the high level skill 'Explosion', the strongest of all offensive magic, and only once a day as it consumes tremendous magical power.
